jsonLd.title: Scripbox is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
We at Scripbox are looking for an experienced Credit Analyst based out of Raipur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Scripbox:
Scripbox is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Risk Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Scripbox!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
